Localization.Description: An attempt to perform a regular expression search on table and column names is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to perform a regular expression search on table and column names on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed a regular expression search on table and column names on host {event_src.host}
